title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.7ProductApr 16, 2026Our latest Opus model brings stronger performance across coding, agents, vision, and multi-step tasks, with greater thoroughness and consistency on the work that matters most.
summary: Product Announcements Introducing Claude Opus 4.7 Apr 16, 2026 Our latest model, Claude Opus 4.7, is now generally available. Opus 4.7 is a notable improvement on Opus 4.6 in advanced software engineering, with particular gains on the most difficult tasks. Users report being able to hand off their hardest coding work—the kind that previously needed close supervision—to Opus 4.7 with confidence. Opus 4.7 handles complex, long-running tasks with rigor and consistency, pays precise attention to instructions, and devises ways to verify its own outputs before reporting back. The model also has substantially better vision: it can see images in greater resolution. It’s more tasteful and creative when completing professional tasks, producing higher-quality interfaces, slides, and docs. And—although it is less broadly capable than our most powerful model, Claude Mythos Preview—it shows better results than Opus 4.6 across a range of benchmarks: Last week we announced Project Glasswing , highlighting the risks—and benefits—of AI models for cybersecurity. We stated that we would keep Claude Mythos Preview’s release limited and test new cyber safeguards on less capable models first. Opus 4.7 is the first such model: its cyber capabilities are not as advanced as those of Mythos Preview (indeed, during its training we experimented with efforts to differentially reduce these capabilities). We are releasing Opus 4.7 with safeguards that automatically detect and block requests that indicate prohibited or high-risk cybersecurity uses. What we learn from the real-world deployment of these safeguards will help us work towards our eventual goal of a broad release of Mythos-class models. Security professionals who wish to use Opus 4.7 for legitimate cybersecurity purposes (such as vulnerability research, penetration testing, and red-teaming) are invited to join our new Cyber Verification Program . Opus 4.7 is available today across all Claude products and our API, Amazon Bedrock, Google C
title_es: Anthropic lanza Claude Opus 4.7 con mejoras en ingeniería de software
bajada: Claude Opus 4.7 está disponible y trae mejoras significativas en tareas de programación complejas, visión mejorada y mejor manejo de instrucciones precisas. Los desarrolladores reportan poder delegar código difícil que antes requería supervisión cercana con mayor confianza.
bajada_en: Claude Opus 4.7 is now available with significant improvements in complex coding tasks, enhanced vision capabilities, and better instruction adherence. Developers report being able to confidently delegate hard coding work that previously required close oversight.

title: Sources: Cursor in talks to raise $2B+ at $50B valuation as enterprise growth surges
summary: Returning backers a16z and Thrive are expected to lead the round.
title_es: Cursor en conversaciones para recaudar $2B a valuación de $50B
bajada: Según fuentes, el popular editor de código IA está en conversaciones para una ronda de $2B+ liderada por a16z y Thrive. El crecimiento empresarial de Cursor ha superado expectativas, consolidándolo como herramienta crítica para desarrolladores.
bajada_en: Sources indicate the popular AI code editor is in talks to raise $2B+ led by a16z and Thrive. Cursor's enterprise growth has surged, positioning it as a critical developer tool.

title: ProductApr 17, 2026Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic LabsToday, we’re launching Claude Design, a new Anthropic Labs product that lets you collaborate with Claude to create polished visual work like designs, prototypes, slides, one-pagers, and more.
summary: Product Announcements Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs Apr 17, 2026 Today, we’re launching Claude Design, a new Anthropic Labs product that lets you collaborate with Claude to create polished visual work like designs, prototypes, slides, one-pagers, and more. Claude Design is powered by our most capable vision model, Claude Opus 4.7 , and is available in research preview for Claude Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise subscribers. We’re rolling out to users gradually throughout the day. Design with Claude Even experienced designers have to ration exploration—there's rarely time to prototype a dozen directions, so you limit yourself to a few. And for founders, product managers, and marketers with an idea but not a design background, creating and sharing those ideas can be daunting. Claude Design gives designers room to explore widely and everyone else a way to produce visual work. Describe what you need and Claude builds a first version. From there, you refine through conversation, inline comments, direct edits, or custom sliders (made by Claude) until it’s right. When given access, Claude can also apply your team’s design system to every project automatically, so the output is consistent with the rest of your company’s designs. Teams have been using Claude Design for: Realistic prototypes: Designers can turn static mockups into easily-shareable interactive prototypes to gather feedback and user-test, without code review or PRs. Product wireframes and mockups: Product Managers can sketch out feature flows and hand them off to Claude Code for implementation, or share them with designers to refine further. Design explorations: Designers can quickly create a wide range of directions to explore. Pitch decks and presentations: Founders and Account Executives can go from a rough outline to a complete, on-brand deck in minutes, and then export as a PPTX or send to Canva. Marketing collateral: Marketers can create landing pages, social media assets, and campaign visuals
title_es: Anthropic presenta Claude Design para colaboración en diseño visual
bajada: Claude Design es un nuevo producto en research preview que permite colaborar con Claude para crear diseños, prototipos y presentaciones visuales de forma iterativa. Utiliza Claude Opus 4.7 y está disponible para suscriptores de Claude Pro, Max, Team y Enterprise.
bajada_en: Claude Design is a new research preview product that lets you collaborate with Claude to create designs, prototypes, and presentations iteratively. It's powered by Claude Opus 4.7 and available to Claude Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise subscribers.

title: Kevin Weil and Bill Peebles exit OpenAI as company continues to shed ‘side quests’
summary: Kevin Weil and Bill Peebles are leaving OpenAI as the company shuts down Sora and folds its science team, signaling a sharp pivot away from consumer moonshots toward enterprise AI.
title_es: OpenAI cierra Sora y equipo de science mientras pivota a enterprise
bajada: Kevin Weil y Bill Peebles abandonan OpenAI en medio del cierre de Sora y reducción del equipo de investigación. La compañía está pivotando decididamente hacia soluciones empresariales, alejándose de proyectos consumer y moonshots.
bajada_en: Kevin Weil and Bill Peebles are leaving OpenAI as the company shuts down Sora and folds its science team. OpenAI is pivoting sharply toward enterprise AI and away from consumer moonshots.

title: Anthropic’s new cybersecurity model could get it back in the government’s good graces
summary: The Trump administration has spent nearly two months fighting with AI company Anthropic. It's dubbed the company a "RADICAL LEFT, WOKE COMPANY" full of "Leftwing nut jobs" and a menace to national security. But some of the ice may reportedly be melting between the two, thanks to Anthropic's buzzy new cybersecurity-focused model: Claude Mythos Preview. […]
title_es: Claude Mythos Preview de Anthropic podría mejorar relaciones con gobierno
bajada: El modelo de ciberseguridad Claude Mythos Preview de Anthropic está reduciendo tensiones con la administración Trump. La compañía había sido criticada como "radical" y "woke", pero su enfoque en seguridad cibernética está generando interés gubernamental.
bajada_en: Anthropic's Claude Mythos Preview cybersecurity model is improving relations with the Trump administration. The company had faced criticism as 'radical' and 'woke,' but its focus on cybersecurity is generating government interest.

title: openai /openai-agents-python
summary:
OpenAI Agents SDK The OpenAI Agents SDK is a lightweight yet powerful framework for building multi-agent workflows. It is provider-agnostic, supporting the OpenAI Responses and Chat Completions APIs, as well as 100+ other LLMs. Note Looking for the JavaScript/TypeScript version? Check out Agents SDK JS/TS . Core concepts: Agents : LLMs configured with instructions, tools, guardrails, and handoffs Sandbox Agents : Agents preconfigured to work with a container to perform work over long time horizons. Agents as tools / Handoffs : Delegating to other agents for specific tasks Tools : Various Tools let agents take actions (functions, MCP, hosted tools) Guardrails : Configurable safety checks for input and output validation Human in the loop : Built-in mechanisms for involving humans across agent runs Sessions : Automatic conversation history management across agent runs Tracing : Built-in tracking of agent runs, allowing you to view, debug and optimize your workflows Realtime Agents : Build powerful voice agents with gpt-realtime-1.5 and full agent features Explore the examples directory to see the SDK in action, and read our documentation for more details. Get started To get started, set up your Python environment (Python 3.10 or newer required), and then install OpenAI Agents SDK package. venv python -m venv .venv source .venv/bin/activate # On Windows: .venv\Scripts\activate pip install openai-agents For voice support, install with the optional voice group: pip install 'openai-agents[voice]' . For Redis session support, install with the optional redis group: pip install 'openai-agents[redis]' . uv If you're familiar with uv , installing the package would be even easier: uv init
uv add openai-agents For voice support, install with the optional voice group: uv add 'openai-agents[voice]' . For Redis session support, install with the optional redis group: uv add 'openai-agents[redis]' . Run your first Sandbox Agent Sandbox Agents are new in version 0.14.0. A sandbox agent
title_es: OpenAI lanza SDK para construir workflows con múltiples agentes IA
bajada: OpenAI ha publicado su Agents SDK en Python, un framework lightweight para construir workflows multi-agente agnóstico de proveedor. El SDK soporta OpenAI y 100+ LLMs, con características como handoffs, sandboxes, y voice agents en tiempo real.
bajada_en: OpenAI released its Agents SDK in Python, a lightweight framework for building multi-agent workflows agnostic to providers. The SDK supports OpenAI and 100+ LLMs with features including handoffs, sandboxes, and realtime voice agents.

title: Schematik Is ‘Cursor for Hardware.’ Anthropic Wants In
summary: Schematik is a program that aims to help people vibe code for physical devices. Hopefully, it won’t blow anything up.
title_es: Schematik, 'Cursor para hardware', atrae interés de Anthropic
bajada: Schematik es una herramienta para ayudar a desarrolladores a escribir código para dispositivos físicos, comparable a Cursor pero para hardware. Anthropic está explorando asociaciones con este tipo de soluciones de IA para ingeniería.
bajada_en: Schematik is a tool designed to help developers write code for physical devices, similar to Cursor but for hardware. Anthropic is exploring partnerships with this type of AI engineering solution.

title: Building a Fast Multilingual OCR Model with Synthetic Data
title_es: Hugging Face y NVIDIA crean modelo OCR multilingüe con datos sintéticos
bajada: Hugging Face y NVIDIA presentan un nuevo modelo OCR optimizado y multilingüe entrenado con datos sintéticos. La aproximación con datos sintéticos permite escalar modelos de visión sin dependencia de grandes datasets anotados manualmente.
bajada_en: Hugging Face and NVIDIA present an optimized multilingual OCR model trained with synthetic data. The synthetic data approach enables scaling vision models without reliance on large manually-annotated datasets.

title: Measuring Claude 4.7's tokenizer costs
title_es: Análisis del costo de tokens de Claude 4.7: impacto en presupuestos
bajada: Un análisis detallado mide el costo de tokens del nuevo tokenizer de Claude 4.7, revelando implicaciones económicas para desarrolladores. El artículo se ha viralizado en comunidades de desarrolladores con casi 600 puntos en Hacker News.
bajada_en: A detailed analysis measures Claude 4.7's new tokenizer costs and their economic impact on developers. The article has gone viral in developer communities with nearly 600 points on Hacker News.

title: ‘Tokenmaxxing’ is making developers less productive than they think
summary: There's a lot more code — but it's a lot more expensive and requires a lot more rewriting.
title_es: Optimización excesiva de tokens reduce productividad de desarrolladores
bajada: Un análisis en TechCrunch revela que la obsesión por minimizar tokens ('tokenmaxxing') está haciendo que los desarrolladores escriban más código menos legible, resultando en costos más altos y mayor necesidad de reescrituras. La estrategia es contraproducente para productividad real.
bajada_en: An analysis reveals that obsessive token optimization ('tokenmaxxing') is causing developers to write more verbose code, resulting in higher costs and more rewrites. The strategy is counterproductive for actual productivity.

title: Sam Altman’s project World looks to scale its human verification empire. First stop: Tinder.
summary: World, which has raised eyebrows (but also a lot of interest) with its Orb-centered anonymous verification project, is looking to expand its influence via a bevy of new partnerships.
title_es: Project World de Sam Altman se expande: Tinder será primer socio
bajada: Project World, el startup de verificación de humanidad con orb biométrico de Sam Altman, está escalando con nuevas asociaciones. Tinder será el primer cliente importante para integrar verificación anónima basada en biometría.
bajada_en: Sam Altman's Project World, which uses biometric orbs for human verification, is scaling with new partnerships. Tinder will be the first major client integrating anonymous biometric verification.

title: The App Store is booming again, and AI may be why
summary: New data from Appfigures shows a swell of new app launches in 2026, suggesting AI tools could be fueling a mobile software boom.
title_es: App Store experimenta boom de nuevas aplicaciones impulsado por IA
bajada: Datos de Appfigures muestran un aumento significativo de lanzamientos de apps en 2026, sugiriendo que herramientas de IA están catalizando un boom en software móvil. El fenómeno indica que generative AI está habilitando creadores de aplicaciones independientes.
bajada_en: Appfigures data shows a surge in new app launches in 2026, suggesting AI tools are fueling a mobile software boom. The trend indicates generative AI is enabling independent app creators.

title: Recent advances push Big Tech closer to the Q-Day danger zone
summary: Here's which players are winning the race to transition to post-quantum crypto.
title_es: Big Tech se acerca a Q-Day: progreso desigual en criptografía post-cuántica
bajada: Un análisis de Ars Technica revela que algunos gigantes tech avanzan en transición a criptografía post-cuántica mientras otros se quedan atrás. La "Q-Day" (día en que computadoras cuánticas rompen encriptación) motiva urgencia desigual en la industria.
bajada_en: Ars Technica analysis reveals uneven progress among Big Tech on post-quantum cryptography transition. The looming 'Q-Day' threat drives varying levels of urgency across the industry.

title: Dairy Queen is putting an AI chatbot in its drive-thrus
summary: Dairy Queen is becoming the latest fast food chain to get in on AI, as it's bringing a chatbot to dozens of its drive-thrus across the US and Canada. It aims to help speed up drive-thru service and "encourage customers to add more food to their orders," according to The Wall Street Journal. Following a […]
title_es: Dairy Queen integra chatbot IA en sus drive-thrus
bajada: Dairy Queen se une a cadenas de comida rápida integrando un chatbot IA en decenas de drive-thrus en US y Canadá. El sistema busca acelerar servicio y aumentar ticket promedio al sugerir adiciones a órdenes.
bajada_en: Dairy Queen joins fast food chains in deploying an AI chatbot to dozens of drive-thrus in the US and Canada. The system aims to speed up service and increase average order value through order recommendations.

title: Scan your website to see how ready it is for AI agents
title_es: Herramienta para evaluar si tu sitio está listo para agentes IA
bajada: IsItAgentReady.com es una nueva herramienta que escanea sitios web para determinar su preparación para agentes IA autónomos. Refleja la creciente importancia de hacer web compatible con navegación y ejecución automática de agentes.
bajada_en: IsItAgentReady.com is a new tool that scans websites to assess their readiness for autonomous AI agents. It reflects growing importance of making web compatible with automated agent navigation and execution.
